svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="RAG知识库入库流程" id="rag-ingest-flow"> <mxGraphModel dx="1485" dy="1019" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1500" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="r-title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" value="RAG 知识库 - 文档入库流程（用户主动上传）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="800" x="350" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r-upload" parent="1" style="ellipse;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="用户上传文档 (API: POST /api/rag/documents)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="500" x="500" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r-save-doc" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" value="写入 knowledge_documents 表 (PG业务真相: title + content + SHA256 hash去重)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="640" x="430" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="re1" edge="1" parent="1" source="r-upload" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#666666;" target="r-save-doc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r-split" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" value="TextSplitter 文本切分 (chunkTokenBudget + overlapTokens)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="640" x="430" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="re2" edge="1" parent="1" source="r-save-doc" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#666666;" target="r-split"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r-chunks" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" value="批量写入 knowledge_chunks 表 (PG业务真相: content + chunkIndex + tokenCount)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="640" x="430" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="re3" edge="1" parent="1" source="r-split" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#666666;" target="r-chunks"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r-index-label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#f5f5f5;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="三路索引并行写入" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="180" x="640" y="335" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r-idx1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" value="向量索引: Embedding(chunk) -> upsert -> Qdrant (collection=rag)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="380" x="60" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r-idx2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=10;" value="知识图谱: LLM提取实体关系 -> Neo4j CREATE节点+关系边" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="380" x="560" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r-idx3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;" value="倒排索引(自动): PG tsvector GENERATED ALWAYS AS 自动更新" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="380" x="1060" y="370" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reix1" edge="1" parent="1" source="r-chunks" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;exitX=0.15;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="r-idx1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="526" y="340" /> <mxPoint x="250" y="340" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reix2" edge="1" parent="1" source="r-chunks" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#d79b00;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="r-idx2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reix3" edge="1" parent="1" source="r-chunks" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;exitX=0.85;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" target="r-idx3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="974" y="340" /> <mxPoint x="1250" y="340" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r-done" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="索引完成 -> 文档状态 INDEXED -> 下次对话通过图1 RAG_RECALL Slot 召回" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="800" x="350" y="480" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="re4" edge="1" parent="1" source="r-idx2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#82b366;" target="r-done"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r-fallback-box" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=22;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="容错降级" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="1380" x="60" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r-fallback-v" parent="r-fallback-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=9;" value="Embedding/Qdrant失败: 向量跳过 PG keyword补位" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="360" x="60" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r-fallback-g" parent="r-fallback-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=9;" value="LLM/Neo4j失败: 图谱跳过 向量+倒排仍可用" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="360" x="500" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r-fallback-k" parent="r-fallback-box" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=9;" value="PG tsvector自动列无需容错: 与chunk在同一事务内" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="360" x="940" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="storage-r" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=22;fillColor=#666666;strokeColor=#333333;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#ffffff;" value="最终存储位置汇总" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="1380" x="60" y="660" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sr1" parent="storage-r" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;" value="PostgreSQL (唯一业务真相)
knowledge_documents / knowledge_chunks" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="450" x="20" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sr2" parent="storage-r" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;" value="Qdrant (向量索引)
collection=rag" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="260" x="500" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sr3" parent="storage-r" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=9;" value="Neo4j (知识图谱)
实体+关系 (可重建)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="260" x="790" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sr4" parent="storage-r" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=9;" value="PG tsvector (倒排)
knowledge_chunks.search_vector" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="260" x="1080" y="28" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fQgY1tiTFxlLA-eo_Sqd-1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;" value="写入 knowledge_documents 表 (PG业务真相: title + content + SHA256 hash去重)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="640" x="430" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
